news.t: Trump Media just launched 5 ‘Made in America' ETFs, testing whether political power can function as an investable theme

holdings.infoBox: TSNF is an equity ETF with a total of 130 individual holdings. The top holdings are U.S. Bank Money Market Deposit Account stock at 3.87%, Marvell Technology at 2.68%, Micron Technology at 2.13%, Intel at 1.85%, and KLA Corporation at 1.57%.

overview.description: The Truth Social American Next Frontiers ETF (TSNF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is passively managed to provide exposure to US companies considered to be on the leading edge of technological and industrial innovation. Companies with DEI policies are screened out, the remaining portfolio holdings are equally weighted. TSNF was launched on Dec 30, 2025 and is issued by Truth Social.

data.title: Trump Media just launched 5 ‘Made in America' ETFs, testing whether political power can function as an investable theme
data.text: Wall Street has seen plenty of thematic ETFs, but not one with a sitting U.S. president acting as a de facto marketing engine.
